name: Route
description: Build a supply road connecting your base to our outpost. We need reliable logistics.

name: Clear Barbarian Camp
description: A raider camp threatens our settlement. Eliminate them before they attack.

name: Connect Resource
description: We need [tileResource] for our survival. Connect it to your supply network.

name: Construct Wonder
description: Build [wonder] to prove your faction can restore the old world's glory.

name: Acquire Great Person
description: Great minds are rare in the wasteland. Recruit a [greatPerson] and you'll be rewarded.

name: Conquer City State
description: The settlement of [cityState] has become hostile. Remove them.

name: Find Player
description: Our scouts report another faction called [civName] somewhere out there. Find them.

name: Find Natural Wonder
description: Legends speak of [naturalWonder] surviving the catastrophe. Find it.

name: Give Gold
description: Raiders stole our supplies. We need [amount] gold to recover.

name: Pledge to Protect
description: We need a strong ally against [civName]. Pledge to defend us.

name: Contest Culture
description: The faction with the most Culture growth proves they deserve leadership.

name: Contest Authority
description: The faction with the most Authority growth proves they deserve leadership.

name: Contest Technologies
description: The faction with the most Tech growth proves they deserve leadership.

name: Invest
description: Our settlement is growing. Your investment will speed our recovery.

name: Bully City State
description: The outpost of [cityState] has been hoarding supplies. Time to take what's ours.

name: Denounce Civilization
description: We've been paying tribute to [civName]. Help us break free by denouncing them.
